title: SignResult
description: Result of `rebar sign <ticket_id> <manifest_json> --output json` (and the library sign_manifest() / MCP sign_manifest): the persisted SIGNATURE record plus the resolved ticket_id. manifest is the array of verified-step strings; signature is the HMAC-SHA256 hex; key_id is the environment key fingerprint; head_sha is audit metadata; signed_at is a ns-epoch integer. A validation/resolve failure emits no JSON (stderr + nonzero exit).
